title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: the easiest way to get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other open-source large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, offering sync & async APIs and streaming support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, works in Node and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, letting you use local models in chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI wrapper around Ollama with syntax highlighting and history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot proxy that uses Ollama models instead of OpenAI.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama with ActiveModel-style interfaces.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats with any Ollama model.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: LogSeq plugin that brings local LLM assistance to your notes.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama with async HTTP and native JSON handling.

title: ollama-cpp
summary: Minimal C++17 header-only client for Ollama using libcurl.

title: ollama-distroless
summary: Distroless & GPU-enabled Docker images for Ollama with multi-arch support.

title: ollama-chatgpt-shim
summary: Drop-in OpenAI-compatible REST shim so existing apps can point to Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration for Ollama, enabling local models in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cdktf
summary: CDKTF (Terraform) construct to deploy Ollama on AWS ECS with GPU.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio async and Serde.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All UI backend that can optionally route to Ollama for model management.
